text.title: Multi Project Allocation Tracker Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Multi Project Allocation Tracker artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing snapshot_date + rebalance_proposals; allocation lacks evidence; total_allocated 1.4 has no over_allocation_flag; no capacity field.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
